# bytepluscc_escloud_ip_allow_list (Data Source)

Data Source schema for Byteplus::ESCloud::IpAllowList



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `allow_list` (Set of String) Default group IP allowlist list; separate multiple IPs with commas (,)
- `groups` (Attributes Set) Custom group IP allowlist (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups))
- `instance_id` (String) Instance ID
- `type` (String) Network type
  
    - PRIVATE_ES: Instance private network access
    - PRIVATE_KIBANA: Kibana private network access
    - PUBLIC_ES: Instance public network access
    - PUBLIC_KIBANA: Kibana public network access

<a id="nestedatt--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups`

Read-Only:

- `allow_list` (Set of String) Custom group IP allowlist list cannot be empty; to configure multiple IPs, use commas (,)
- `name` (String) Custom group name
